description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great with office and party wear.Heel: 2"UpperGrooved fabric footbed with a synthetic leather patch ergonomically curved and padded for absolute comfort and styleMetallic thong styled straps Toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a designed heel unit and horizontal grooves on the heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfacesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtRemove dust from fabric using a soft bristled brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
